mapper.select:
/* 캘린더 생성 (검색 기간만큼의 빈 달력 생성) */ WITH RECURSIVE calendar AS ( /* 시작 날짜 설정 */ SELECT
STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{startDate}, '-01-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')
STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{startDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')
AS m_date
UNION ALL
/* 재귀 반복 (1달 또는 1년씩 더함) */ SELECT
DATE_ADD(m_date, INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
DATE_ADD(m_date, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
FROM calendar WHERE
DATE_ADD(m_date, INTERVAL 1 YEAR) <= STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{endDate}, '-01-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')
DATE_ADD(m_date, INTERVAL 1 MONTH) <= STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{endDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')
),
/* 2. 실제 데이터 집계 (질문등록일 → 최종답변완료일, 비영업일 제외) */ stat_data AS ( SELECT /* 조인 키 생성 (년도 or 월) - 최종답변완료일 기준 */
DATE_FORMAT(hist.final_comp_dt, '%Y')
DATE_FORMAT(hist.final_comp_dt, '%Y-%m')
AS join_date
/* 평균 소요일 계산: (최종답변완료일 - 질문등록일) 비영업일 제외, 일 단위 변환 */ , ROUND(AVG(GREATEST(0, (DATEDIFF(hist.final_comp_dt, tbbp.reg_dt) - IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${schema}.ntn_std_cldr d WHERE d.dt >= DATE(tbbp.reg_dt) AND d.dt <= DATE(hist.final_comp_dt) AND d.wrkdy_yn = 'N'), 0)))), 2) AS avg_days FROM ${schema}.bbs_pst tbbp INNER JOIN ${schema}.bbs tbb ON tbb.bbs_oid = tbbp.bbs_oid INNER JOIN ( SELECT reply.up_bbs_pst_oid, MIN(tbh.reg_dt) AS final_comp_dt FROM ${schema}.bbs_hstry tbh INNER JOIN ${schema}.bbs_pst reply ON tbh.tbl_oid = reply.bbs_pst_oid WHERE tbh.tbl_nm = 'bbs_pst' AND tbh.stts = 'COMP' AND reply.up_bbs_pst_oid IS NOT NULL AND reply.del_yn = 'N' GROUP BY reply.up_bbs_pst_oid ) hist ON tbbp.bbs_pst_oid = hist.up_bbs_pst_oid WHERE tbb.bbs_se_cd = 'QNA' /* QnA 게시판 */ AND tbbp.up_bbs_pst_oid IS NULL /* 질문 글 기준 */ AND tbbp.del_yn = 'N' /* 삭제되지 않은 게시물 */ AND tbb.stats_yn = 'Y' /* 통계 포함 여부 */ AND tbb.use_yn = 'Y'
/* 검색 기간 필터 (최종답변완료일 기준) */ AND hist.final_comp_dt >=
STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{startDate}, '-01-01 00:00:00'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{startDate}, '-01 00:00:00'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND hist.final_comp_dt <=
STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{endDate}, '-12-31 23:59:59'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
/* 해당 월의 마지막 날짜의 23:59:59까지 */ STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(LAST_DAY(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{endDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')), ' 23:59:59'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
GROUP BY join_date )
/* 최종 조회 */ SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(c.m_date, '%Y')
DATE_FORMAT(c.m_date, '%Y-%m')
AS searchDate
/* 데이터가 없으면 0으로 치환 */ , IFNULL(sd.avg_days, 0) AS avgDays FROM calendar c LEFT JOIN stat_data sd ON
DATE_FORMAT(c.m_date, '%Y') = sd.join_date
DATE_FORMAT(c.m_date, '%Y-%m') = sd.join_date
ORDER BY c.m_date ASC
